name: belahub
description: BelaHub - SaaS Platform for Beauty Salon Management

scripts.build:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run build:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.build:all-railway: npm run install:frontend && npm run build:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.railway-build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && CI=false npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ..

author: BelaHub Team
